commands: export HOME=/root && git config --global --add safe.directory /opt/pedagolens && cd /opt/pedagolens && git pull origin main 2>&1
echo '=== Syntaxe all ===' && for f in /opt/pedagolens/plugins/pedagolens-*/includes/*.php /opt/pedagolens/plugins/pedagolens-*/admin/*.php; do php -l "$f" 2>&1; done
systemctl restart apache2 && echo 'Apache restarted OK'
